The find command can be used with -name "*.c" to get files matching the pattern. Then, to check their size, I can use -size '+1k' to ensure they're larger than 1KB. The -print option will list them. 

So the command would be something like: find /testdata/workspace -name "*.c" -size '+1k' -print.
